fixed. By adding 2 signs to the figure for the J2th house you
will get the cusp of the 2nd house; and by adding 4 signs to that
of the llth house you get the figure for the 3rd house. By
adding 6 signs to the 2nd house and to the 3rd house severally
you get the 8th and 9th house-cusps. The following table gives
the above results in a clear form : —
